title: Mini CreATive
description: Mini CreATive is a simple Minecraft mod that adds hidden technical blocks like Minecraft Command Block, Barrier Block, Light Block,... directly to the Creative Inventory.
body:
Mini CreATive is a simple Minecraft mod that adds hidden technical blocks like Minecraft **_Command Block_**, **_Barrier Block_**, **_Light Block_**,... directly to the Creative Inventory.

No more using commands — just open your inventory and start building. Perfect for map makers and creative builders who want quick access to powerful blocks.
